description: Configure the Chrome browser for municipal planning and public City Council presentations according to the specification document at ~/Desktop/planning_browser_spec.txt. Organize professional bookmarks into the required folders, remove all personal bookmarks, and sanitize the browser by clearing history and cookies for those personal domains only. Set the default font size to 18, create the 'municode' and 'parcel' custom search engines, and configure the specified startup pages. Set the download directory to ~/Documents/Spatial_Data and enable the prompt to ask where to save files.
